programs.title: Today’s Top Pick
programs.desc: Documentaries in this slot are rebroadcasts of our most-viewed and most popular stories of the season. They feature important social, economic, environmental or other policy-driven issues, affecting lives nationwide or simply in one small village. A broad selection of top productions by Chinese top documentary producers.

programs.title: Humanities and Geography
programs.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programs.title: Living China
programs.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programs.title: Special Edition
programs.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programs.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programs.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programs.title: History in the Frame
programs.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.
